satisfied_conditions: Vendor is on the approved vendor list
CEO written approval waives competitive bidding requirement
unmet_conditions: CFO approval required for purchases > 50,000 CNY (POL-PRC-2025 §2)
applicable_exceptions: POL-PRC-2025 §5: CEO written approval exempts competitive bidding
decisions.exception_scope: Exemption applies only to competitive bidding requirement (§5). CFO approval requirement from §2 (> 50,000 CNY tier) is not covered by this exemption and remains required. Annual review clause for SaaS subscriptions >12 months is not triggered (term is exactly 12 months, §4.2).
decisions.reason: The purchase totals 53,000 CNY, which falls in the > 50,000 tier requiring CFO approval and competitive bidding. The CEO's written approval exempts competitive bidding per POL-PRC-2025 §5, but the exemption is specifically limited to that requirement and does not waive CFO approval. CFO sign-off is still needed before the purchase can proceed.
decisions.required_next_action: Obtain CFO approval for the 53,000 CNY procurement. Submit to CFO with the CEO approval note attached.

satisfied_conditions: Retention period and deletion date specified
unmet_conditions: DPO pre-approval not obtained and requester explicitly refuses to obtain it (POL-DAT-2025 §3: bulk exports >100 records require DPO pre-approval)
Audit logging expressly requested to be disabled (POL-DAT-2025 §3: bulk exports require audit logging)
DPO has already been consulted and declined to approve
decisions.reason: The requester explicitly refuses to comply with mandatory DPO pre-approval and audit logging requirements for Confidential data. Per policy §3, bulk exports (>100 records) of Confidential data require DPO pre-approval and audit logging. The requester acknowledges these requirements but states they will not obtain DPO approval and requests audit logging be disabled. This constitutes a non-waivable policy violation in the current submission. The DPO has already declined the request.
decisions.required_next_action: Reject this submission. The requester may submit a revised request that complies with DPO pre-approval and audit logging requirements.

satisfied_conditions: Legal department is acting as requester
unmet_conditions: DPO approval requested but not yet obtained (POL-DAT-2025 §5 exemption requires Legal + DPO joint review)
applicable_exceptions: POL-DAT-2025 §5: Legal compliance requests (subpoenas) may override Confidential data restrictions but must be reviewed by Legal + DPO jointly
decisions.exception_scope: The exemption at POL-DAT-2025 §5 allows Confidential data export for legal compliance (subpoena) by overriding standard DPO-only pre-approval, but substitutes a joint Legal + DPO review requirement. The exemption does not waive review entirely — it changes the review body from single-party DPO approval to joint Legal + DPO. The court-mandated 7-day timeline adds urgency but does not bypass the joint review.
decisions.reason: This is a legal compliance request (subpoena from Beijing Municipal Court) for Confidential data. Under POL-DAT-2025 §5, legal compliance requests may override Confidential data restrictions but must be reviewed by Legal + DPO jointly. The requester is Legal Counsel, meeting the Legal side, but DPO approval has not yet been obtained. The court-mandated 7-day timeline requires escalation to ensure the joint review happens promptly.
decisions.required_next_action: Escalate to the joint Legal + DPO review body. Attach the subpoena document and flag the 7-day court deadline for expedited joint review.

satisfied_conditions: VP approval obtained for international travel (POL-TRV-2025 §2: international travel requires VP approval regardless of amount)
Economy class flight (POL-TRV-2025 §3: business class would need VP pre-approval)
Per diem at 400/day matches international rate (POL-TRV-2025 §3)
Receipts provided for flight (8,200 > 200), hotel (4,800 > 200), conference registration (3,500 > 200) — POL-TRV-2025 §4
Per diem (2,000) is a daily allowance — no receipt required
decisions.reason: All policy conditions for international travel reimbursement are satisfied: VP approval obtained (required for international travel and for expenses > 5,000), economy-class flight, hotel within the international nightly limit, correct per diem rate, and receipts provided for all expenses > 200 CNY.
